channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Anne Curtis, Fyang Smith, and Kim Chiu nominated for Seoul International Drama Awards 2026; fan voting details announced

item.title: Czechia’s physical strength and set-piece threat pose major challenge for Bafana in World Cup clash
item.description: Bafana Bafana are preparing for a tough 2026 FIFA World Cup encounter against Czechia in Atlanta on Thursday, with the European side expected to rely heavily on their physicality, defensive organisati...

item.title: Ubisoft Confirms Original Rayman Legends Will Remain Available Alongside Rayman Legends Retold
item.description: Ubisoft has confirmed that the original versions of Rayman Legends will remain available even after the release of Rayman Legends Retold, a remake scheduled to launch on October 1, 2026, for Nintendo ...

item.title: United Kingdom to restrict social media access for users under 16 starting 2027
item.description: The United Kingdom has announced a new policy banning children under the age of 16 from accessing major social media platforms, including TikTok, X, Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, Snapchat, and Threads...

item.title: Study Identifies Direct Mitochondria-to-Nucleus Energy Transfer Mechanism Essential for Cell Function and Embryonic Development
item.description: Researchers have discovered a previously unknown mechanism that allows cells to deliver energy directly from mitochondria to the nucleus, challenging the long-standing assumption that cellular fuel si...

item.title: Nazi Racial Classification Practices and Anthropometric Measurements in Germany, 1941
item.description: The article highlights a historical photograph taken on January 1, 1941, showing Nazi officials using calipers to measure the nose of an ethnic German. The image illustrates one aspect of the Nazi reg...

item.title: Intel Plans Core 200 Raptor Lake Next Processors for LGA-1700 Platform Launch in 2027
item.description: Intel is reportedly preparing another refresh of its long-running LGA-1700 desktop platform with a new processor family known as Core 200 “Raptor Lake Next,” scheduled for production in early 2027. Ac...

item.title: KeNHA to Close Nairobi-Bound Section of Mombasa Road for 24 Hours During Airtel Footbridge Installation
item.description: The Kenya National Highways Authority (KeNHA) has announced a temporary 24-hour closure of part of Mombasa Road in Nairobi to facilitate construction works on the Airtel Footbridge project. According ...

item.title: Opinion: Trump Uses Investigations and Failed Prosecutions as Tools of Political Intimidation
item.description: In this opinion article, commentator Thom Hartmann argues that the Trump administration's legal actions against political opponents, protesters, activists, and critics are not primarily intended to se...

item.title: Linda Yaccarino's Career Earnings and Net Worth as Media Executive
item.description: Linda Yaccarino, the American media executive born in 1963, has built an impressive career over several decades. Her net worth is estimated between $35 million and $40 million as of June 2026. She ser...

item.title: Hank Azaria criticises celebrity ticket privileges after Taylor Swift’s courtside appearance at NBA Finals game
item.description: Actor Hank Azaria has expressed frustration over Taylor Swift receiving courtside seats at a recent NBA Finals game involving the New York Knicks. Speaking on The Dan Le Batard Show with Stugotz, Azar...

item.title: Vintage Photos Celebrate Connie Stevens and Her Rise as a 1960s Television and Music Icon

item.title: Barrie Airshow Ends with Final Snowbirds Performance Over Simcoe County
item.description: The Barrie Airshow concluded with a final appearance by the Canadian Forces Snowbirds, marking the end of another successful aviation event in Simcoe County. The article focuses on the closing day of ...

item.title: US and Iran agree on peace framework to end conflict, signing set for Friday
item.description: US and Iranian officials have reportedly agreed on a peace framework aimed at ending their ongoing conflict, with a formal signing scheduled for Friday in Switzerland. The announcement was first made ...

item.title: CRDB Bank Encourages Regular Exercise as Wellness Programme Reaches Dar es Salaam and Coast Regions
item.description: CRDB Bank has continued strengthening its employee wellness agenda by encouraging staff to exercise at least three times every week to improve physical fitness, mental wellbeing and productivity at wo...

item.title: Legal commentator argues Supreme Court decisions could affect Republican prospects in the 2026 midterm elections

item.title: Punjab to expand Liquid Tree initiative to improve urban air quality
item.description: The Punjab government has decided to expand its innovative Liquid Tree project as part of broader efforts to tackle rising urban pollution and smog levels through science-based environmental solutions...

item.title: Three arrested after Dalit worker was allegedly killed in Uttar Pradesh following dispute at drinking gathering
item.description: A 33-year-old Dalit man, identified as Rajkumar alias Chhannu, was allegedly beaten to death by three of his coworkers in Uttar Pradesh’s Lalitpur district. According to the police, the incident took ...

item.title: Psychologist John Gartner Claims Trump's Mental Health Is Deteriorating and Warns of Potential Risks From His Leadership
item.description: The article reports on comments made by psychologist and author Dr. John Gartner during an appearance on The Daily Beast Podcast hosted by Joanna Coles. Gartner, a former assistant professor at Johns ...

item.title: Analysts Criticize U.S.–Iran Agreement Announced by Trump, Questioning Its Effectiveness
item.description: President Donald Trump announced that the United States and Iran had reached a new agreement aimed at creating a pathway toward ending a conflict that has lasted more than 100 days. According to Trump...
